content:
✨ maplibre-gl-js | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Embedding interactive, high-performance maps into web applications.
✨ Key Features: • Interactive vector tile maps • GPU-accelerated rendering • Open-source fork of mapbox-gl-js • Customizable map styles • Support for various map layers (e.g., heatmaps, 3D buildings)
📖 Summary: MapLibre GL JS is an open-source JavaScript library for displaying interactive vector tile maps on websites and web applications. It leverages GPU acceleration for fast rendering and originated as a fork of mapbox-gl-js.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
